content.en:
In the Purple Aurora Domain, the scope of will exploration is not large, even the detection range of the Purple Aurora Beast is not large, so Ye Tian tracked this Purple Aurora Beast from afar, only tracking it with the Copying Talent, this Purple Aurora Beast couldn't perceive it at all, so he didn't know that someone was following it.

At first, Ye Tian didn't find anything, but he was not in a hurry, what he had was time.

Time passed slowly, and one day, a legendary realm lord encountered this purple aurora beast, and the two sides had a big battle, and Ye Tian did not participate, the purple aurora beast had a strong ability to save its life in a place like the purple aurora light domain, and was good at escaping.

Therefore, the purple aurora beast still escaped.

After about a few epochs, the purple aurora beast seemed to find it bored and began to shuttle quickly in one direction.

"Could it be that it's going back?"

Ye Tian's heart moved.

Spinning "one three zero", that is, he hurried to follow

With the legendary eternal skill of the Void Step, his speed is many times faster than that of the Purple Aurora Beast, and it does not cause any fluctuations, silently, as if walking between nothingness.

This Purple Aurora Beast has been shuttling for a long time, and this piece of the Purple Aurora Domain of the Source Sea has been shuttled by it, but it is shuttling towards the Purple Aurora Domain farther away.

Obviously, the place where it was originally located was very far away from the Source Sea and the Infinite Sea, so it had not been discovered for a long time, but now it was afraid that it had migrated nearby, and some Purple Aurora Beasts liked to run around, so it was discovered.

After a long time, the speed of the Purple Aurora Beast slowed down.

this day.

Ye Tian's copying talent sensed the other Purple Aurora Beasts.

"Copy!"

"Copy!"

"Copy!"

Ye Tian kept copying the time talents of these Purple Aurora Beasts, and his heart was extremely excited, because there were quite a few Purple Aurora Beasts, and he definitely had the hope of fusing the Legendary Ancestral Gift-level Time Talent.

Just as Ye Tian followed the Purple Aurora Beast and was about to approach the Purple Aurora Beast's lair, a terrifying aura came across the void.

He was discovered!

"Run!"

Ye Tian immediately made a decision and was about to escape.

Although now all the copied bodies can be used as the main body, so one copied body has copied the talent, and the other copied bodies are re-copied and replaced one by one, which is equivalent to obtaining these time talents one by one, and he has nothing to lose.

But he still doesn't want this copy body to fall, he doesn't want to develop a character that is not afraid of death, in case it is difficult to copy the body one day, once this character is cultivated, it will be over.

Therefore, if he can not die, he still does not want to fall any replica body.

Bang!!!!

A purple light burst out from the extreme distance, penetrating time and space, shattering everything and even the purple aurora light domain was split into a path of light.

The power of this attack is already very close to the half-step Legendary Realm Lord, and the other party is afraid that it can be called an invincible existence among the Legendary Lords of the Transcendent Realm.

"Eternal Path!"

"Grey Mist Eternal Dao!"

A kind of eternal path is blessed in Ye Tian's body, and all kinds of legendary-level defensive eternal skills are also blessed on his body.

But even so, Ye Tian knew that he would definitely be hit hard by a blow, so it would be difficult to escape from the other party's pursuit.

Therefore, Ye Tian urged a fragment of the eternal treasure - the fragment of the Blue Void Bell.

This Eternal Treasure Fragment was of little help to Ye Tian, Ye Tian almost forgot about it, but now under the crisis of life and death, Ye Tian thought of it, and this replica body happened to carry this treasure.

But it takes time to urge the fragments of the Qingxu Bell, so Ye Tian needs to block the other party's blow by himself.

Poof!

Under the purple light, Ye Tian's Eternal Dao was shattered, and many defensive eternal skills were also torn apart, directly penetrating Ye Tian's body.

At this moment, Ye Tian was seriously injured, after all, the other party was an almost invincible existence of the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord, and his strength was at most comparable to the powerful Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord, and the difference in strength was still very large.

But in the time it took to bear this blow, Ye Tian had already urged the fragment of the Qingxu Bell.

Airplanes!

The fragments of the Blue Void Seed wrapped Ye Tian's body, tearing the void and leaving.

The next moment.

A huge Purple Aurora Beast appeared where Ye Tian was, roaring angrily.

It is not good at long-distance shuttle tracking, so it can't catch up with Ye Tian.

......

The other end of the purple aurora light domain.

Ye Tian's body appeared, and a small fragment of the Blue Void Bell was slightly dim.

"The breath of the fragments of the Qingxu Bell is even weaker, I'm afraid that it will be completely scrapped after only a few uses at most!"

Ye Tian thought to himself........

But he doesn't care, anyway, this thing is not worth much, so it is a little useful in the face of the Purple Aurora Beast, if it is against other top Transcendent Realm Legendary Lords or half-step Legendary Realm Lords, the Qingxu Bell fragment is not at all, and the other party can chase it over in an instant.

There is no holy place.

Ye Tian was inquiring about the information about the Purple Aurora Beast, and after checking it for a long time, he really found it.

There is a record of the Purple Aurora Beast in the True Void Holy Land, but it is only a simple record, because this creature is really rare.

The Purple Aurora Beast is an eternal life of the time line, and the place where it was born will inevitably produce an extremely precious material, the Time Constant Gold, which is so precious that even the Legendary Realm Lord is a little interested.

But what is the specific use, Ye Tian doesn't know.

"Maybe you can cooperate with the True Unholy Land, otherwise, as soon as you get close to the lair of the Purple Aurora Beast, before you have time to get close, you will be hunted down, and you won't be able to copy too much time talent at all, if you have the half-step Legendary Realm of the True Unholy Land, you may be able to directly enter the lair of the Purple Aurora Beast, so as to copy the time talent on all the Purple Aurora Beasts. "

Thereupon.

Ye Tian came to find the Frostless Lord.

The Frostless Lord is in retreat, but she still has a clone that is not in retreat, but is training in the outside world.

At the beginning, Ye Tian sent a message to the Frostless Lord, who said that he didn't have much time.

But when Ye Tian mentioned 0.9, the Purple Aurora Beast, the Frostless Lord appeared.

There is really no holy place, Ye Tian's residence.

When the Frostless Lord came, he immediately asked, "Endless Lord, have you found the Purple Aurora Beast?"

Ye Tian nodded, "There is an area between the Source Sea and the Infinite Sea called the Purple Aurora Domain, where the Purple Aurora Beast has now appeared. "

The Frostless Lord asked seriously, "Are you sure it's the Purple Aurora Beast?" In the Void Area, there are many purple creatures, and the Purple Aurora Beast is very rare. "

"I'm sure!" Ye Tian assured, "Moreover, I found the location of their lair, but before I got close, I was chased and killed by a Purple Aurora Beast that could be called the invincible Legendary Lord of the Transcendence Realm. I checked, the place where the Purple Aurora Beast was born is very likely to have Time Constant Gold, maybe there is a Time Constant Gold Billion Frostless Lord there, what is the use of Time Constant Gold?"

16. To see the ununderlined version of the novel, please download the Flying Novel APP!
